series_metadata.series_title: Initial licensure, renewal, reinstatement applications and Apprentice Registrations
series_metadata.series_description: Applications of all licenses and apprentice registrations issued by the Board. Also includes required documentation, e.g., transcripts, exam scores, and other documents required by rule.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy. ; Electronic: Scanned images to be retained indefinitely in licensing system., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
